rag_rules: Generate guarantees relating visible outputs to visible inputs using only component-type scope identifiers.
Use eq declarations to create boolean helpers for complex conditions before referencing them in guarantees.
generic_rules: Express dependencies using only AADL-visible ports or locally declared constants and equations.
Ensure all identifiers in AGREE expressions are explicitly typed as int, real, or bool.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must be wrapped in annex agree {** ... **};
Use const for named constants, eq for intermediate expressions, guarantee for output claims.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not use subcomponent paths or implementation-only names in component type annexes.
